subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned toward the horizon of Revelation! Thy letter which thou didst send unto one of My loved ones hath reached Us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی افق الظهور قد حضر کتابک الذی ارسلته الی احد احبائی الذی
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @wisdom [hikmat], @prayer for service
